title: Helmet Bomb
description: Helmet Bomb is a datapack that adds an explosive helmet for both players and mobs
body:
### **How does this datapack work?**
When a mob is generated the mob has a 50% chance of having a bomb helmet the bomb helmet can only have certain creatures:
- Zombie
- Zombie Villager
- Skeleton
- Skeleton Wither
- Pillager
- Evoker
- Vindicator
  
_These mobs will have an explosion level that can be from 1 to 10 depending on the explosion level will close the explosion they will make_

![....](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5105b47aba78328ef0690564f2ad30508dd9d9ac.webp)
### **How can I have the bomb helmet?**
The only way to get the bomb helmet is with its crafting:

![..](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b011e9416503631f7a548aeb71408e1240c73416.webp)

### **What are the benefits of wearing a bomb helmet?**
By having the bomb helmet in the head slot you have the possibility to explode the following mobs:
- bat
- cat
- chicken
- cow
- donkey
- fox
- frog
- glow_squid
- goat
- horse
- llama
- mooshroom
- mule
- ocelot
- panda
- parrot
- pig
- rabbit
- salmon
- sheep
- skeleton_horse
- squid
- strider
- tadpole
- trader_llama
- tropical_fish
- turtle
- villager
- wolf
- bee
- cave_spider
- dolphin
- enderman
- iron_golem
- piglin
- piglin_brute
- polar_bear
- wandering_trader
- zombified_piglin
- blaze
- creeper
- drowned
- elder_guardian
- evoker
- ghast
- guardian
- hoglin
- husk
- magma_cube
- phantom
- pillager
- ravager
- shulker
- silverfish
- skeleton
- slime
- spider
- stray
- vex
- vindicator
- warden
- witch
- wither
- wither_skeleton
- zoglin
- zombie
- zombie_villager
  
_You do not decide when it explodes when you are near one of these mobs you will explode instantly
And remember the explosion will be Level 10_

### **What are the explosion radii?**

## **When the mobs have the helmet:**
![,,](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30adcf93cec878b749bca0fe1668236242bb007a.webp)
When a mob has the helmet it will have a range of 2 blocks if the player gets to that range the mob will explode

## **When the player has the helmet**
![...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a2606ac55c1d12cc258b7a75932f4f0cc8818ff.webp)

When a mob is in a range of 10 blocks it will light up red and show you a text that says "come a little closer"
if you come closer 
The range will be 3 blocks if a mob enters you will explode with a level 10 explosion

### **What is the durability of this item?**

![..](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19c9e7c6fe7a213bfc7c2885644a2c100b156273.webp)

The idea is that if you make a mistake you have the option to break it

## **FEEDBACK**
